name: todoru
description: todoru.sh — a cmux-style terminal TODO that floats in the top-right corner

scripts.icon: python3 build-icon.py && rm -rf build/icon.iconset && mkdir -p build/icon.iconset && for s in 16 32 128 256 512; do sips -z $s $s build/icon_1024.png --out build/icon.iconset/icon_${s}x${s}.png; sips -z $((s*2)) $((s*2)) build/icon_1024.png --out build/icon.iconset/icon_${s}x${s}@2x.png; done && iconutil -c icns build/icon.iconset -o build/icon.icns

author: utaro
